name: IdsEdwCmnPrctFcltyAffilDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_src AS (SELECT CPFA.CMN_PRCT_FCLTY_AFFIL_SK, CPFA.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CPFA.CMN_PRCT_ID, CPFA.AFFIL_SEQ_NO, CPFA.CMN_PRCT_SK, CPFA.AFFIL_FCLTY_PROV_SK, CPFA.PRI_AFFIL_IN, CPFA.EFF_DT_SK, CPFA.LAST_VER_DT_SK, CPFA.TERM_DT_SK, COALESCE(CM.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CMN_PRCT_FCLTY_AFFIL CPFA LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CM ON CPFA.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CM.CD_MPPNG_SK), cte_transform AS (SELECT cte_src.CMN_PRCT_FCLTY_AFFIL_SK AS CMN_PRCT_FCLTY_AFFIL_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_src.SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_src.SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, cte_src.CMN_PRCT_ID AS CMN_PRCT_ID, cte_src.AFFIL_SEQ_NO AS CMN_PRCT_AFFIL_SEQ_NO, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte_src.AFFIL_FCLTY_PROV_SK AS PROV_SK, cte_src.CMN_PRCT_SK AS CMN_PRCT_SK, cte_src.EFF_DT_SK AS CMN_PRCT_FCLTY_AFFIL_EFF_DT_SK, cte_src.LAST_VER_DT_SK AS CMNPRCT_FCLTY_AFF_LASTVER_DT_SK, cte_src.TERM_DT_SK AS CMNPRCT_FCLTY_AFIL_TERM_DT_SK, cte_src.PRI_AFFIL_IN AS PRI_AFFIL_IN, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_src) SELECT * FROM cte_transform

Annotations:
JOB NAME: IdsEdwCmnPrctFcltyAffilDExtr
DB2 connector brings in data from IDS table CMN_PRCT_FCLTY_AFFIL
Data is written into a load ready SF file named as CMN_PRCT_FCLTY_AFFIL_D.dat
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
